subject: Cloud Computing
title: AWS Criticisms and Controversies
description: A short lesson to help you apply AWS Criticisms and Controversies.

hook.text: AWS hosts some of the most controversial platforms on the internet. Deciding who stays is political.

buildup.text: In 2021, AWS dropped Parler from its servers, reigniting debates about cloud provider power.

discovery.text: Critics argue that three companies controlling most cloud infrastructure is a dangerous concentration.

twist.text: AWS also faces antitrust scrutiny. Using its market data to compete with its own customers raises concern.

climax.text: Cloud dominance brings responsibility. AWS shapes what can exist online — and what can't.

punchline.text: AWS is infrastructure. But infrastructure is power.

quiz.question: What antitrust concern has been raised about AWS?
options: Using market data from its platform to compete with its own customers
Charging different prices in different countries
